commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=10b6028f706a4a75d42b3997d83cd26a5dab21ca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `waitForAgentJob` so the outer wait timer returns a pending sub-agent timeout snapshot after checking pending errors.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. by source: emit an aborted lifecycle timeout, then let the `waitForAgentJob` outer timer fire before timeout grace publishes; current main resolves null unless the pending timeout is consulted. The linked issue also includes live evidence that the same wait-layer fix still misses zero-output delivery.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the PR proof is insufficient for the full claimed fix and maintainers must decide whether to require the delivery-layer fix before merge or accept this as a partial repair.

target.title: fix(gateway): notify parent session on sub-agent run timeout
target.author: xuzehan-icenter

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
